article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks 47 non-market rental units at 5860 Olive Avenue
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council adopted Bylaw 14751 on June 24, 2025, authorizing a housing agreement with Polygon Onyx Homes Ltd. requiring 47 non-market rental units in a new 34-storey tower to be rented at below-market rates tied to CMHC and BC Housing income limits.
briefs.action_required: Review the Housing Agreement's rent-setting and tenant-eligibility obligations to ensure ongoing compliance with permitted rent and income limit requirements.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025
